common.tagline: I turn complexity into digital solutions that work, communicate, and grow.
common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Education, practice, and professional direction
profile.bio: Wesley Maia holds a bachelor's degree in Computer Science, with experience in software development, systems analysis, networking, infrastructure, technical support, software quality, and technology teaching. He works across front-end and back-end applications, APIs, databases, Linux and Windows environments, ERP, infrastructure, networking, and storage. He is expanding his practice into digital marketing, visual creation, brand presence, paid traffic, content, and engagement.

build.title: Build
build.description: Websites, systems, APIs, automations, integrations, and databases.

communicate.title: Communicate
communicate.description: Digital marketing, communication design, landing pages, content, brand presence, campaigns, and paid traffic.

sustain.title: Sustain
sustain.description: Support, hardware, infrastructure, networking, servers, testing, and quality.

profile.availability: Remote services available nationally and internationally. On-site services subject to availability, location, and travel costs covered by the requester.
profile.quote: He who has a why to live can bear almost any how.

lab.title: Wesley Lab
lab.subtitle: Where challenges become solutions.
lab.intro: Choose what best describes your need. Related services will be highlighted and the form will be prepared for you.

needs.build_site: I want to build a website or system
needs.fix_problem: I need to solve a technical problem
needs.promote_business: I want to promote my business
needs.improve_identity: I want to improve my digital identity
needs.meet_wesley: I want to know Wesley professionally

lab.meetWesleyHint: Explore the full profile and the archive of projects, certifications, and experience.

contact.title: Start a conversation
contact.subtitle: Tell me what you need. You will hear back by email or WhatsApp, whichever you prefer.

fields.name: Name
fields.consent: I authorize storing this data so my request can be answered, as described in the privacy policy.

validation.nameTooLong: Name must be at most 120 characters.
validation.whatsappInvalid: Please enter a valid WhatsApp number.
validation.emailOrWhatsapp: Provide at least an email or a WhatsApp number.
validation.messageRequired: Describe your need in at least 10 characters.
validation.messageTooLong: Description must be at most 2000 characters.
validation.consentRequired: You must authorize storage to submit.
validation.turnstileFailed: Security verification failed. Reload and try again.
validation.rateLimited: Too many submissions in a short time. Please wait a few minutes.
validation.serverError: Could not send right now. Please try again shortly.

success.title: Message received
success.description: Thank you for reaching out. You will hear back through the channel you chose.

contact.whatsappMessage: Hello, Wesley. My name is {name}. Category: {category}. {message}

wesleyAi.title: Wesley AI
wesleyAi.description: An assistant trained on this site's public content is under development. It will help you explore projects, services, and contact options.
wesleyAi.notYet: For now, these shortcuts take you straight to what you need:

footer.builtBy: Designed and developed by Wesley Maia.

banner.title: Cookies and privacy
banner.description: This site uses cookies that are necessary for it to work and, with your consent, anonymous usage metrics (Vercel Analytics).

preferences.title: Cookie preferences
preferences.necessaryDescription: Essential for the site to work: language, admin session, and your consent choice. They cannot be disabled.
preferences.analyticsDescription: Anonymous navigation metrics (Vercel Analytics) to understand how the site is used. Loaded only with your consent.

pwa.offlineDescription: This page could not be loaded without a connection. Check your internet and try again.

errors.notFoundDescription: The address you were looking for does not exist or has been moved.
errors.errorDescription: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again.

login.title: Admin panel
login.subtitle: Access restricted to the site administrator.
login.unauthorized: This email has no administrative permission.
login.genericError: Could not sign in. Please try again.
